prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第25名持续上升至2025年第21名、2026年第23名，稳居全国顶尖工科院校前列，层次持续提升；2026年声誉信号偏负面（校园安全事件），但该校作为\"国防七子\"之一、\"共和国总工程师的摇篮\"，整体社会声誉正面；抖音热度排名第74、评价\"一般\"，曝光度中等；未 见明显投档断档记录；航空宇航科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+、机械工程A、控制科学与工程A-等7个A类学科，与招生专业高度匹配 ，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域:
计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，航空航天类专业社会关注度高；江西省2026年普通高考考生约474900人 ，较2025年472480人略有增加；省控线物理类本科批从2024年448分降至2025年429分，特殊类型控制线从520分降至505分，整体竞争环境趋紧；西北工业大学位 于陕西西安，属西部985，在江西省招生计划稳定在57–65人区间，跨省招生占比适中；该校在陕招生比例较高，对江西考生而言属于\"外地优质985\"，地域偏好无明显偏向。
8 .【预测结论】综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招、学校层次持续提升及优势学科吸引力强等因素，在2025年基准1964名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位 次约1914名，区间1627–2201名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3760 → 3880 → 2823 → 2438 → 1964, with a continuous forward shift (decreasing numbers) over the past 5 years, accumulating a forward shift of about 1796 places, indicating intensifying competition year by year; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1964.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial Physics Category plan was 65 students each year from 2021 to 2023, 66 in 2024, reduced to 58 in 2025, and planned at 57 for 2026, a further reduction of 1 student compared to 2025, with two consecutive years of slight enrollment reduction, slightly exacerbating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has risen from 25th in 2021 to 21st in 2025 and 23rd in 2026, consistently among the top engineering schools nationwide, with a continuously improving level; the reputation signal for 2026 is slightly negative (campus safety incident), but as one of the 'Seven Sons of National Defense' and the 'Cradle of Chief Engineers of the Republic', its overall social reputation is positive; Douyin popularity ranking is 74th, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; it has 7 A-level disciplines including Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, which are highly matched with its enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, while Aerospace majors have high social attention; the number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province General College Entrance Examination is approximately 474,900, a slight increase from 472,480 in 2025; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch dropped from 448 in 2024 to 429 in 2025, and the special type control line dropped from 520 to 505, indicating a tightening overall competitive environment; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western 985 university, with a stable enrollment plan in Jiangxi Province ranging from 57 to 65 students, with a moderate cross-provincial enrollment proportion; the university has a relatively high enrollment proportion in Shaanxi, making it a 'high-quality out-of-province 985' for Jiangxi candidates, with no obvious regional preference bias.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Considering the continuous forward shift trend of historical rankings, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026, the continuous improvement of school level, and the strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1964; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1914, with a range of 1627–2201.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1900–2200, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<1627), focus on reaching for top majors like the Smart Three Aerospace Elite Class and Huang Yushan Aviation Class; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (>2200), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Social popularity of economics/finance majors is divided and wait-and-see, with business administration clearly discouraged; in 2026, the number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jiangxi Province is about 474,900, with the History Category proportion estimated at about 43% (about 204,000) based on recent years, roughly flat compared to 206,055 in 2025; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch rose from 463 in 2024 to 486 in 2025, and the special type control line rose from 532 to 539; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western 985 university, with only 5–6 History Category enrollment slots, extremely small scale, making it a 'high-threshold niche choice' for Jiangxi liberal arts candidates, with no clear regional preference.
8. [Prediction Conclusion] Based on the stable historical rankings in recent years, the 20% enrollment expansion in 2026, the appeal of the 985 level, and the roughly flat total number of liberal arts candidates, competition is expected to ease slightly from the 2025 baseline of 1231; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1359, with a range of 1155–1563.
